How to Use Mulebuy Sheets

What is Mulebuy Sheets?

Mulebuy Sheets is a shopping sheet tool designed for global shoppers. It organizes scattered product resources into clear, easy-to-browse lists. With direct product links, users can quickly jump to proxy platforms such as Kakobuy, Litbuy, Oopbuy, and Mulebuy to complete their purchase.

How do I get discounts and exclusive benefits?

  • New user benefits: Sign up to receive welcome rewards with no mandatory spending limits.
  • Share rewards: Earn points and bonuses by sharing your real shopping experience.
  • Affiliate program: Share your referral link or QR code to earn commissions from new sign-ups and valid orders.

What are the service rules and fees?

Mulebuy Sheets provides transparent, low-cost service: full access to product data and listings at no charge; no extra service fees, only product cost and shipping; note: import customs duties are borne by the buyer.

Can I buy without using a proxy platform?

Yes. You can find the item you like on Mulebuy Sheets, copy the product link, and paste it into any trusted proxy platform such as Kakobuy, Acbuy, Litbuy, Oppbuy, or Mulebuy to complete your global purchase.

Disclaimer & Transparency

The footer disclaimer document states that Mulebuysheet.org is a product sheet database created exclusively for Mulebuy, covering dozens of product categories and nearly 200 world-renowned brands. All listed products are compiled from public product collections shared by the Reddit community and official open Discord channels, totaling over 10,000 specific items. A large portion of these products has undergone strict quality inspection and screening.

This website only provides product display and reference services and does not support any actual transactions. You can use the direct product links on our site to access Mulebuy, Kakobuy, Litbuy, and more trusted shopping proxy platforms for your purchases. Enjoy your shopping experience.
